instruction:
Define a macro that eliminates this repetitive pattern:
(pop-preprocessor-directive-token token-list :|_Pragma|)

Issue: Macro call that should be transformed by pop-preprocessor-directive-token
reference_defmacro:
(defmacro pop-preprocessor-directive-token (token-list directive-name &key (errorp t))
  "Pops the next token in TOKEN-LIST ignoring `+whitespace-marker+'"
  (with-gensyms (head_)
    `(let ((,head_
             (check-and-pop-pp-directive-token-1 ,token-list ,directive-name ,errorp)))
       (if (eq +whitespace-marker+ ,head_)
           (check-and-pop-pp-directive-token-1 ,token-list ,directive-name ,errorp)
           ,head_))))
